summary: Comprehensive testing completed for new German insurance chatbot SchutzKI features: Temperature control, Human Evaluation, and AI Prompt Improvement. All backend APIs working perfectly, frontend features implemented and functional.

ui_bugs.issue: Submit button may require winner selection validation before enabling
ui_bugs.workaround: Ensure winner is selected before submission

passed_tests: Temperature value properly passed to experiment API
Human Evaluation button appears after experiment
Human Evaluation panel opens with 1-10 star ratings
Winner selection buttons (A, Tie, B) functional
Human evaluation saves to database via API
AI Improve button (sparkles icon) present in Prompt Library
Prompt library shows correct type badges
German language UI maintained throughout new features
